character.name: Jeon Woo

appearance.distinctiveFeatures: Crescent moon tattoo on left wrist

character.backstory: Raised in the library-city of Lumendor, searching for his missing father

character.name: Terry Vyn
character.backstory: Grew up in a plague-stricken village and learned medicine to prevent others from suffering the same fate as her family

character.name: Dan Thorn

appearance.distinctiveFeatures: Missing left eye, replaced with a steel prosthetic

character.backstory: Once a royal scout, he was framed for treason and now hunts criminals while searching for the truth behind his exile

character.name: Hoshi Solis

appearance.distinctiveFeatures: Faint glowing runes on palms when casting spells

character.backstory: Discovered her magical abilities by accident and fled after attracting the attention of a powerful arcane order

name: Grace Graves

appearance.distinctiveFeatures: Dark circles under eyes, carries talismans to ward spirits

backstory: Investigates haunted locations after a childhood encounter with a vengeful spirit
